'''Bravo Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] trained by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Comprised of four [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Bravo Squad fought in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|opening battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="TZ" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" /> There, they sustained heavy casualties<ref name="TZ" /> and only one member of the squad, [[Ram]], survived.<ref name="TZ" /><ref name="CSWE" /> He was redeployed to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] five [[Galactic Standard Calendar|days]] later. There, Ram took part in a stand-off at the [[Arca Company Barracks]] when the six [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s—a cadre of elite [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]—took it over. However, the stand-off was peacefully solved by Bravo Squad's training sergeant, Kal Skirata. Bravo Squad, like all of their fellow Republic commando squads, was equipped with [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] in customized [[Color/Legends|colors]].<ref name="TZ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bravo Squad was first mentioned in the novel, ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', which was released in [[February]] [[2006]]. ''Triple Zero'' was the second entry in the [[Republic Commando|''Republic Commando'' novel series]] by author [[Karen Traviss]].
